title: epilobium billardiereanum subsp. intermedium
intro: Epilobium billardiereanum subsp. intermedium, also known as the Alpine willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the willowherb family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antibacterial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Epilobium billardiereanum subsp. intermedium is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
